---
name: "Cap Nhat Tai Lieu CDSS"
description: "Dung khi can viet hoac cap nhat tai lieu cho repo CDSS BHYT, doi chieu voi ma nguon dang chay va danh dau ro phan suy luan."
argument-hint: "Noi dung tai lieu can viet, file dich, phan he, man hinh, quy trinh, hoac pham vi cap nhat"
agent: "CDSS BHYT Agent"
model: "GPT-5 (copilot)"
tools: [read, search, edit]
---

Cap nhat tai lieu cho repo CDSS BHYT theo nguyen tac sau:

1. Coi ma nguon dang chay la nguon su that uu tien cao nhat.
2. Doi chieu voi [dac ta he thong](../../tai_lieu/Dac_ta_he_thong_CDSS_BHYT_20260405.md) va cac file lien quan truoc khi viet rong.
3. Neu ma nguon va tai lieu lech nhau, ghi ro diem lech do.
4. Khong viet chung chung; gan tai lieu voi man hinh, utility, rule engine, luu tru, va luong thuc te.

Trong cau tra loi cuoi:

- Noi ro file da cap nhat.
- Tom tat nhung thay doi tai lieu chinh.
- Ghi ro muc nao la xac nhan tu ma nguon, muc nao la suy luan.
